hero.heading: Cheesesteaks done the Philly way.
hero.subheading: Thin-sliced ribeye, gooey provolone, hoagie rolls that mean it. Pulled straight outta South Philly to the corner of Victory Blvd.

about.heading: 59 reviews. 4.8 stars. The closest thing to Pat's on the west coast.
paragraphs: Philly On The Block is run by a born-and-raised Philly native who got tired of bad cheesesteaks in LA. We use real Amoroso-style rolls, ribeye sliced fresh, and we don't skimp on the cheese.
Walk up, order at the window, grab a folding chair on the patio. We're open Tuesday through Sunday and we run out when we run out.

services.title: Classic Cheesesteak
services.description: Thin-sliced ribeye, sautéed onions, melted provolone on an Amoroso-style hoagie. The signature.

services.title: Whiz Wit
services.description: The classic, with Cheez Whiz and grilled onions — exactly how they make it in Philly.

services.title: Chicken Cheesesteak
services.description: Same beautiful sandwich, marinated chicken instead. Add peppers for $2.

services.title: Philly Combo
services.description: Cheesesteak + house-cut fries + a drink. The full deal.

services.title: Hoagie
services.description: Italian-style cold hoagie — capicola, mortadella, salami, provolone, lettuce, tomato, oil & vin.

services.title: Loaded Fries
services.description: House-cut fries topped with steak, cheese, and onions. Eat with two hands.

reviews.name: Joey D.
reviews.text: Born in South Philly. This is the real thing. The roll is right, the meat is right, the wiz is on point. Cried a little.

reviews.name: Lisa K.
reviews.text: Easily my favorite sandwich in Burbank. Crew is super friendly, sandwiches are massive, prices are fair.

reviews.name: Anthony R.
reviews.text: Whiz wit, fries, root beer. Tasted like home. Will be back constantly.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Philly On The Block, 2600 W Victory Blvd, Burbank, CA

seo.title: Philly On The Block — Authentic Philly Cheesesteaks in Burbank, CA
seo.description: Real Philly cheesesteaks in Burbank — Amoroso-style rolls, ribeye, wiz wit. Tuesday–Sunday, 2600 W Victory Blvd. Call (818) 406-6053.
